creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-04-29 19:04:40 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/rubygem-net-netrc Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Net::Netrc is a pure-Ruby module providing ftp(1)-style .netrc
  parsing. It is inspired by Graham Barr's Perl Net::Netrc module.
  
  WWW:    http://net-netrc.rubyforge.org/
  
  PR:             ports/122709
  Submitted by:   IWATSUKI Hiroyuki <don at na.rim.or.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1989    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/net/rubygem-net-netrc/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/rubygem-net-netrc/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/net/rubygem-net-netrc/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/net/rubygem-net-netrc/pkg-plist (new)
